message:
fix(node): replace exact float equality with epsilon comparison

Use `f64::EPSILON`-based approximate comparison instead of `== 0.0`
for floating-point division guards:

- sybil_defense.rs `trust_ratio()`: Prevents potential false-positive
  zero check when established node weight is extremely small but
  non-zero due to floating-point arithmetic
- performance_hardening_metrics.rs `overhead_ratio()` and
  `cold_start_ratio()`: Same pattern for p99 baseline and warm-start
  denominators

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
